system.description:
Race: Half-Elf

Attribute Check: Wisdom

This ability allows half-elves to spot secret, hidden and concealed doorways. A half-elf passing within 5 feet of such a doorway is entitled to a wisdom check. Success means that the half-elf notices the door as if actively searching for it. When a half-elf does actively search for such doorways, the bonus to the wisdom check is +1.
